title: Time Vortex TARDIS: Mechanical Marvels
description: Vanilla like modpack tailored specifically to the Time Vortex TARDIS mod. Features quality of life improvements and automation.
body:
This is a very basic modpack intended to still feel quite a bit like vanilla while playing. It's tailored specifically so the Time Vortex (TARDIS) mod fits in and is useful for automation and transportation. It features Create and practically every addon for Create, CC: Tweaked, Advanced Peripherals, Backpacks, and some other basic gameplay improving mods. You can create wonderful factories, train systems, even a TARDIS taxi system with the help of computer craft.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ed3ad0add528fcb709e227caf8c6e082b754be8.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e515c8d0845d1e35b8c258b5cded36c982586d10.png)

I downloaded Just Enough Resources from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-resources-jer)
